mxCell.value:
Recuperator Heat Exchanger
(CBC Hi Temp / Low Temp Interface)

Gas Cooler Heat Exchanger
(CBC / Radiator Interface)

Heat Source Heat Exchanger
(CBC / Reactor Interface)

This network should be run at the same rate as the fluid networks it interfaces with.

If a full fluid loop for the Reactor is modeled and the "tempReactor" potential is removed, then this network can be set to DUMMY mode to save CPU.
